title: The Girl I Like Speaks in Uchinaaguchi
overview: Nakamura Teruaki has moved south to Okinawa from Tokyo and fallen in love with a local girl. There's just one problem, though: her Okinawan dialect is so thick that he can't understand a word she says!

title: A Beach Party Is Just a Social Gathering?!
overview: Teruaki is excited for the big class beach party, but he's the only one who wants to swim?!

title: Shiisaa and Eisaa
overview: Teruaki learns more about Okinawan traditions, goes to a festival...and sneaks off somewhere "naughty"?!

title: Blow Your Finger Whistle at the Beautiful Sea!
overview: Teruaki learns to whistle, and how the Okinawans dance.

title: Kariyushi Wear by Mistake!
overview: Teruaki tries on what he thinks is just a Hawaiian shirt, and discovers it has a deeper history than he imagines.

title: I Want to Cry "Okinawa Soba"!
overview: Teruaki learns the history of Okinawan soba, and a typhoon closes in.

title: Vipers and Mongooses
overview: Teruaki learns the sorrowful tale of the time mongooses were brought to Okinawa.

title: Yui Rail Rides to the Music!
overview: Teruaki discovers that there are no trains in Okinawa.

title: Amazing! The Iriomote Cat!
overview: Kyan tells Suzu the story of the Iriomote cat and its ancient history.

title: The True Identity of the Yaaruu?!
overview: Teruaki takes Higa on a test of courage and is shocked by what he finds.

title: Goya? Gooyaa?
overview: Teruaki learns the truth about goya and gooyaa.

title: Anshee Matayaa! (See You Again Sometime!)
overview: Kyan panics when she finds out that Teruaki likes her.
